The Bhagavad Gita âSong of the Lordâ is a conversation between Lord Krsna and the warrior prince Arjuna on the battlefield of the Kurukshetra. It provides a practical philosophy which expounds the technique for an active and peaceful life. Above all, it ushers one towards the goal of spiritual Enlightenment.

Sunandaji will be taking Chapter 12 'Yoga of Devotion' in Mumbai from the 13th - 16th September.
